rationale: Multi-step audit: collision detection + KB upsert needs moderate judgment per flag event.
Full-registry reconciliation + messaging summary involves moderate synthesis and reporting.
Stale-flag scan + ticket filing + digest requires light judgment on staleness criteria.
Deterministic single-tool sweep creating file:line idea entries — explicit rule, no synthesis.
Recomputing statistical baselines from raw data is mechanical aggregation with fixed formulas.
Real-time classify + enrich + route + anomaly-scan requires moderate multi-step judgment per event.
Formatted digest with WoW trends and severity grouping needs light editorial shaping.
Compiling raw memories into coherent wiki articles requires synthesis and structure judgment.
Drain + extract + store raw session memories is structured extraction and persist — mechanical.
Auditing for stale/contradictory/gap memories and surfacing for review needs nuanced judgment; review_mode=always.
Fetch approved review body and file a structured GitHub/GitLab issue — template-driven mechanical routing.
Auditing skill quality and proposing edits/retirements requires editorial judgment; review_mode=always.
Soft-delete + farewell email + masked alert involves multiple consequential steps; review_mode=always.
Sync email change to Supabase + send confirmation — deterministic two-step data propagation.
Day-keyed drip advancement is rule-based dispatch: check day counter, send fixed email template.
Signup fan-out to fixed targets (Supabase, messaging, email, state) is deterministic multi-sink routing.
Writing correct missing tests for uncovered modules requires deep code understanding and quality judgment.
Bug hunting in a codebase demands deep reasoning, security/correctness judgment, and high error cost; review_mode=always.
Codebase architecture review + ADR publication is deep multi-source analysis where quality is the whole point.
Evaluating an idea against architecture and producing a scoped implementation plan is high-judgment strategic work.
Code review for security/correctness is high-judgment but current_override pins it to sonnet; aligns with rubric default.
Semver bump + changelog + release notes drafting is structured multi-step with light editorial judgment.
Analyzing commits to sync README + changelog requires moderate prose judgment and multi-source diff reading.
PR testing + standards-policy verdict in isolated worktree requires moderate multi-step reasoning.
DNS resolution + variant generation + ledger comparison is deterministic pattern matching with no synthesis.
Critical incident root-cause hypothesis from correlated signals is high-stakes reasoning; review_mode=always.
Metric collection + baseline learning + warning-level anomaly detection is moderate statistical monitoring.
Rolling stats aggregation (triage/draft/grad counts) into a fixed summary layout is mechanical formatting.
Full-ledger status report is structured data formatting with no analysis or judgment required.
Periodic sweep with graduated reminder batching follows explicit escalation rules — mechanical routing.
Urgency-graded deal change alerting needs judgment to grade urgency; review_mode=always elevates above haiku.
Tiered stale-deal escalation by age thresholds is deterministic rule-based routing with no synthesis.
Fetch Sentry issues + memory-dedup filter is structured retrieval with mechanical noise suppression.
Threshold inventory alerts + velocity calc are deterministic numeric comparisons with no prose synthesis.
Per-order log + classify + high-value threshold alert is structured extraction and rule-based routing.
Refund logging + quality-issue flag is simple record + threshold alert — fully mechanical.
Weekly portfolio delta report across multiple audits requires moderate cross-audit synthesis and reporting.
Subscribing + polling to build a rolling error index is mechanical ingestion and structured storage.
